items.titleHint: Taypro Launches Movable Docking Station for Solar Cleaning Robots
items.summary: Taypro introduces a movable docking station (MDS) that enables autonomous row transfer for utility-scale solar cleaning robot fleets across India.
facts: Taypro is India's #1 robotic solar module cleaning equipment supplier (Mercom 2024 leaderboard, 27.5% market share).
MDS enables robots to move between rows without manual intervention.
Taypro operates 5 GW+ of robotic cleaning capacity across Indian utility and C&I solar plants.
Waterless dry cleaning recovers up to 12% lost generation vs soiled modules.

items.titleHint: Taypro Retains Leadership in India's Robotic Solar Cleaning Market
items.summary: Taypro reinforces its position as India's leading supplier of robotic solar module cleaning equipment with continued deployments across major IPPs.
facts: Mercom India ranked Taypro #1 in robotic solar cleaning equipment for 2024.
Deployments include Tata Power, Avaada, Amplus, and other major Indian solar portfolios.
Taypro offers both CAPEX and OPEX service models for robotic cleaning.
Fleet uses hybrid LoRa mesh connectivity for remote monitoring.

items.titleHint: Taypro Wins Gold at Mint Tech4Good Awards 2024 for Green AI in Solar
items.summary: Taypro recognised with a Gold award at Mint Tech4Good Awards 2024 for AI-driven waterless solar cleaning solutions.
facts: Mint Tech4Good Awards celebrate technology for social and environmental impact.
Taypro's AI scheduling optimises cleaning cycles based on soiling, weather, and generation data.
Waterless cleaning eliminates water use on arid solar sites.
